task_completion.description: Verify the Security Group 'APAC Sales Region' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'APAC Sales Region' in the Security Groups list view, detail view header, or edit screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct description was added to the Security Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Access control group for the Asia-Pacific territory sales team.' in the description field of the Security Group.

task_completion.description: Verify the user 'Akiko Lin' is assigned to the Security Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Akiko Lin' in the 'Users' subpanel or related list on the 'APAC Sales Region' detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify the account 'Tokyo Electronics KK' is assigned to the Security Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Tokyo Electronics KK' in the 'Accounts' subpanel or related list on the 'APAC Sales Region' detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify the account 'Tokyo Distribution Partners' is NOT assigned to the Security Group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ensure 'Tokyo Distribution Partners' does NOT appear in the 'Accounts' subpanel or related list for the 'APAC Sales Region' group.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the CRM application, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL, SQLite, or shell commands should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually clicked through the assignment screens.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate screens like 'Select User', 'Select Account', or popup search windows used for assigning records in the CRM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Security Group Name: 'APAC Sales Region'. Target Description: 'Access control group for the Asia-Pacific territory sales team.'. Target User to assign: 'Akiko Lin'. Target Account to assign: 'Tokyo Electronics KK'. Distractor Account that MUST NOT be assigned: 'Tokyo Distribution Partners'.
